task_completion.description: Navigate to the Study Event Definitions page for the DM-TRIAL-2024 study.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenClinica interface showing the 'Build Study' or 'Study Event Definitions' page with the active study identified as 'DM-TRIAL-2024'.

task_completion.description: Rename the 'Baseline Assessment' event to 'Screening and Baseline Visit'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The event list or edit form shows the event name updated to exactly 'Screening and Baseline Visit'.

task_completion.description: Update the description of the baseline event to include the Amendment 03 details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The description field for the baseline event contains the text 'Screening procedures followed by baseline clinical and laboratory assessments per Amendment 03' (look specifically for 'Amendment 03').

task_completion.description: Modify the 'Week 4 Follow-up' event to be a repeating visit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Repeating' property (usually a radio button, dropdown, or checkbox) for the 'Week 4 Follow-up' event is set to 'Yes' or checked.

task_completion.description: Set the category for the 'Week 4 Follow-up' event to 'Treatment Window'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Category' text field for the 'Week 4 Follow-up' event contains 'Treatment Window'.

task_completion.description: Set the category for the 'End of Treatment' event to 'Study Completion'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Category' text field for the 'End of Treatment' event contains 'Study Completion'.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenClinica web GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with web forms, buttons, and navigation menus in OpenClinica, rather than terminal windows executing SQL database updates.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with a real web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The presence of standard browser UI elements (address bar, tabs) showing the OpenClinica URL, not a text editor or a locally mocked HTML file.

integrity.description: The 'Adverse Event Report' event was left unchanged as instructed.
integrity.visual_evidence: In the Study Event Definitions list, the 'Adverse Event Report' event should still be present with its original name and no visible modifications.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Study Identifier: DM-TRIAL-2024. Expected Baseline Name: 'Screening and Baseline Visit'. Expected Baseline Description must contain 'Amendment 03'. Expected Week 4 Repeating: true (or 'Yes'). Expected Week 4 Category: 'Treatment Window'. Expected End of Treatment (EOT) Category: 'Study Completion'.
